seoTitle: Bonnyrigg vs Bonshaw — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bonnyrigg and Bonshaw. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bonnyrigg and Bonshaw.
heading: Bonnyrigg vs Bonshaw — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bonnyrigg, New South Wales and Bonshaw, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bonnyrigg has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Bonshaw (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bonnyrigg or Bonshaw safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bonnyrigg has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Bonshaw scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bonnyrigg scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Bonshaw scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bonnyrigg or Bonshaw?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bonnyrigg has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
